query: I need to add an 'Export Orders' button to the order detail page in Business Manager. It should open a dialog that lets the merchant pick a date range and then trigger a pipeline. How do I set up the XML for the dialog action and wire it to my controller?

We're building a custom admin tool for our merchandising team that lives inside BM. They need a new menu section under 'Merchant Tools' with two sub-items linking to custom pages. What's the cartridge structure and XML I need?

I have an existing bm_ cartridge and I want to add a form extension to the site preferences page. The form should add a new field group with three text inputs. How do I define the form overlay in my extension cartridge?

Our admin users need a custom dashboard inside Business Manager that shows real-time inventory levels across warehouses. I need to create the menu entry, the controller that fetches the data, and the template. Walk me through the full setup for a BM extension.

I'm getting a 'menu action not found' error after deploying my Business Manager customization. The cartridge is on the path and the XML looks correct. What are the common pitfalls with bm_extensions.xml that could cause this?
We need to restrict who can see our custom BM pages. How do I set up permissions for a Business Manager extension so only users with a specific role can access the menu items and dialog actions?
How do I add a new category navigation link to the storefront header menu? I want it to appear between 'Women' and 'Men' in the top nav bar using the SFRA navigation controller.
I need to build an admin panel for managing product recommendations. The panel will be a custom SCAPI endpoint that a React frontend calls -- what's the API structure?
How do I create a custom object type definition in my site metadata XML so I can import it during deployment? I need a type with three indexed attributes.
I want to customize the storefront checkout flow to add a gift message step. How do I extend the checkout controller and add the new template?
